Our Beautiful Story

Every moment with you
is a memory I treasure

May 2026  ·  Written with love and tears

My dearest, darling Bujikiii,

I know I hurt you. And there is not a single moment that passes where I don't feel the weight of that. You deserved better — and I am so, deeply, truly sorry.

The situation that came between us — someone from my past, someone who was once a friend and once more than that — I understand why it shook the ground beneath you. I would have felt exactly the same. But I need you to know, from the most honest, most vulnerable place inside me: that chapter is closed. You are my present. You are my forever.

When I look at every photo of us — every laugh, every car ride, every silly face, every quiet moment, every time you leaned your head on me — I see the only person who has ever made life feel truly, completely full. That person is you. Only you.

No one from my past, no one in this world, holds a place that even comes close to what you hold in my heart. You are not replaceable. You are irreplaceable. You are everything.

I'm asking you — please don't let someone from my past take away what we've built together. Our story is so beautiful. Please don't let it end here.

I choose you. Today, tomorrow, and every day after that — without hesitation, without doubt.

Yours, completely and only yours, 💕

What you mean to me

My peace My home My laugh My favourite My warmth My forever My whole heart My only one My everything

There is no one else, Bujikiii.
There is only you.

💕

Im always yours, ONLY YOURS,
Bujikiii

You are my only one  ·  Always  ·  Forever
